name: AutoShape 2
textPreview: Module: D-cache Update

name: AutoShape 4
text:
What changed since DR I:
- simple_dcache now exposes evict_valid, evict_addr, evict_data
- Eviction fires when a valid L1 line is displaced on a refill
- Write miss path separated into refill and write-through stages
- This prepares the baseline cache for victim-cache integration
textPreview: What changed since DR I: | - simple_dcache now exposes evict_valid, evict_addr, evict_data | - Eviction fires when a valid L1 line is dis...

name: AutoShape 6
text:
Testbench focus:
- Existing directed d-cache tests cover read miss, read hit, write hit, write miss, conflict miss
- Current blocker: Verilator reports cpu_if.ready/rdata are driven through an input-only modport
- Fixing the interface direction is the next priority
textPreview: Testbench focus: | - Existing directed d-cache tests cover read miss, read hit, write hit, write miss, conflict miss | - Current blocker:...

name: AutoShape 2
textPreview: Module: LRU Replacement

name: AutoShape 6
text:
Implementation:
- Parameterized NUM_SETS x NUM_WAYS tracker
- age = 0 means most recently used
- largest age is selected as victim_way
- Used by victim_cache as one-set, four-way replacement
textPreview: Implementation: | - Parameterized NUM_SETS x NUM_WAYS tracker | - age = 0 means most recently used | - largest age is selected as victim_...

name: AutoShape 8
text:
Testbench focus:
- testbench_lru.sv checks victim order after touches
- Local run passed: 3 -> 2 -> 1 -> 0 -> 3 victim sequence
- full LRU TB targets 4-way + 2-way golden-model testing
- Full TB currently needs variable/reference cleanup

name: AutoShape 2
textPreview: Module: Next-Line Prefetcher

name: AutoShape 4
text:
Implementation:
- Interposes between L1 miss bus and DRAM
- Stores one prefetched block in a buffer
- Demand requests have priority over prefetches
- Writes invalidate matching prefetched lines
- Exposes issue/fill/hit counters
textPreview: Implementation: | - Interposes between L1 miss bus and DRAM | - Stores one prefetched block in a buffer | - Demand requests have priority...

name: AutoShape 6
text:
Testbench focus:
- Cold demand read launches next-line prefetch
- Prefetched read is faster and chains another prefetch
- Non-sequential miss replaces buffered line
- Write invalidates stale prefetched data
- In-flight next-line request is captured
textPreview: Testbench focus: | - Cold demand read launches next-line prefetch | - Prefetched read is faster and chains another prefetch | - Non-seque...

name: AutoShape 2
textPreview: Module: Victim Cache

name: AutoShape 4
text:
Implementation:
- Four-entry fully associative victim cache
- Placed between simple_dcache and dram_model
- Read hit returns block directly without DRAM access
- Read miss / writes forward downstream
- Absorbs L1 evictions through evict_* ports
textPreview: Implementation: | - Four-entry fully associative victim cache | - Placed between simple_dcache and dram_model | - Read hit returns block ...

name: AutoShape 6
text:
Testbench focus:
- CPU-L1-VC-DRAM topology is written
- Intended flow: read A, read conflicting B, re-read A from VC, then L1 hit
- Also prints VC entries and eviction pulses
- Current compile is blocked by the d-cache modport issue
